name: Repeat Until Perfect

abilities.name: Harness Chi
abilities.text: When this model declares the Prepare action, it may gain a Chi token instead of other tokens.

abilities.name: Enlightened Teachings
abilities.text: After this model is deployed, it gains a Chi token.

actions.name: Test of Worth
actions.effects: Select three allies, ignoring range and LoS. They must each be within 14" of another selected ally, ignoring LoS. The chosen models may each remove a Chi token. All enemy models within the area formed by the three models must pass a TN 13 (fortitude) duel or be dealt 1 damage, +1 for each token removed.

extraction_notes: Two symbol (♦♦) appears before 'Test of Worth' indicating a two-action cost
